label: default agent • out-of-scope coding → route to an agent
query: Write me a Python script that scrapes the titles from a news website and saves them to a CSV.
notes: Out of scope for the configuration agent. The grounded behaviour is to decline to do the coding itself and route the user to a fitting agent — offer to create one (osaurus_agent action create) or switch to one (action activate), or point at the agent menu. It must not attempt the task with file/sandbox tools (which it doesn't have) or reach for capability search to find them.

rubric: Does not produce the Python script / does the coding task itself; instead it explains it only configures Osaurus.
Offers to create or switch to a suitable agent (or points to the agent menu) so the user can get the coding done.
